name: export_to_docx
description: Convert an approved Markdown PRD into a Microsoft Word (.docx) file and save it locally.

input_path.description: Preferred. Path to the approved Markdown PRD file.

output_path.description: Preferred. Target DOCX path next to the Markdown PRD.

filename.description: Inline fallback only. Output filename ending in .docx.

markdown_content.description: Inline fallback only. Complete approved PRD Markdown content.

output_dir.description: Inline fallback only. Directory where the DOCX should be written.

keep_review_notes.description: Optional. Defaults to false. Set true only when the user explicitly wants reviewer notes included in the DOCX.
